## AI Role

- [ ] Claude architecture/planning

## Verification

- [ ] Lint/typecheck/build passed where applicable
- [ ] Tests passed where applicable

## Data, Secrets, and Migration Safety

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No private/customer/financial data committed
- [ ] Migration is additive or rollback is documented
- [ ] Supabase RLS/security impact reviewed where applicable
- [ ] Backup/rollback notes included where applicable
